_raw_fallback: The SCEM Composer has been instructed to render only the Interpreter's structured output into analytical prose, but no structured_claims[] or living KB entries were provided in the context. As a result, the Composer cannot introduce any factual assertions and therefore cannot produce a meaningful weekly brief draft. The claim_trace[] array is empty because there are no factual spans to trace. This is a structural limitation of the current input, not a failure of the Composer logic. The engine should either provide the Interpreter output (interpret-latest.json) or flag this as a missing-input error rather than expecting the Composer to fabricate content.
